criteria.name: Only one EditMode type definition exists (in editSettingsTypes.ts), with members: text | inpaint | annotate | reposition | img2img | upscale
criteria.evidence: Direct repo search found a single EditMode definition at src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts:1. inpainting/types.ts now imports and re-exports that canonical type instead of defining its own local union.

criteria.name: No toInpaintingEditMode function exists anywhere in the codebase
criteria.evidence: Repo grep for toInpaintingEditMode returned no matches. useImageEditOrchestrator.ts and useInlineEditState.ts pass editMode directly into useInpainting.

criteria.name: No 'as ImageEditMode', 'as ImageEditState[...]', or 'as any' type casts related to editMode in touched files
criteria.evidence: Repo grep for type ImageEditMode, as ImageEditMode, as ImageEditState[, and edit-mode-related as any returned no matches in the touched image-edit files. The prior casts are removed from useImageEditOrchestrator.ts, useInlineEditState.ts, MediaDisplayWithCanvas.tsx, and buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts.

criteria.name: useInpainting accepts editMode as a required prop (not optional) of the canonical EditMode type
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/inpainting/types.ts:62-66 now declares editMode: EditMode and setEditMode: (mode: EditMode) => void, with EditMode imported from ../../model/editSettingsTypes at line 4.

criteria.name: useInpainting does not contain fallback editMode state (no fallbackEditMode useState)
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useInpainting.ts:74-76 only retains fallback state for annotation/prompt/generation count; editMode is read directly from the required prop at line 100 and repo grep for fallbackEditMode returned no matches.

criteria.name: useImageEditOrchestrator returns persistedEditMode (wide type), not inpaintingHook.editMode
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useImageEditOrchestrator.ts:330-331 passes persistedEditMode into buildImageEditStateValue, and the hook return at line 352 is editMode: persistedEditMode.

criteria.name: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
criteria.evidence: Executor recorded a successful npx tsc --noEmit in T1, T3, T4, and final validation T5, with T5 explicitly marked green in finalize.json.

criteria.name: All existing tests in src/domains/media-lightbox/ and src/tools/edit-images/ pass
criteria.evidence: Executor recorded npx vitest run src/domains/media-lightbox/ passing 38 files / 162 tests and npx vitest run src/tools/edit-images/ passing 3 files / 13 tests in T5/finalize.json.

criteria.name: No behavioral changes — all edit modes (text, inpaint, annotate, reposition, img2img, upscale) continue to work
criteria.evidence: Automated coverage supports this: useInpainting now explicitly tests reposition/img2img/upscale pass-through with empty brushStrokes, useImageEditOrchestrator tests persisted reposition/img2img/upscale round-trip, useInlineEditState tests non-inpainting mode pass-through and setter wiring, and the broader media-lightbox/tools suites still pass.

criteria.name: New targeted test: orchestrator returns 'reposition' (not 'text') when persistedEditMode is 'reposition'
criteria.evidence: New file src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useImageEditOrchestrator.test.ts includes it.each(['reposition','img2img','upscale']) asserting both result.current.editMode and result.current.imageEditValue.editMode stay equal to the persisted mode.

criteria.name: New targeted test: inline editor passes non-inpainting modes through without narrowing
criteria.evidence: src/tools/edit-images/hooks/__tests__/useInlineEditState.test.ts adds a reposition case asserting useInpainting receives editMode: 'reposition' and a setter case asserting imageEditValue.setEditMode('img2img') calls persistence with 'img2img'.

criteria.name: New targeted test: useInpainting returns empty brushStrokes for non-inpainting modes (reposition, img2img, upscale)
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/__tests__/useInpainting.test.ts adds it.each(['reposition','img2img','upscale']) asserting returned editMode matches input, brushStrokes is [], and isAnnotateMode is false.

criteria.name: ImageEditMode type alias is removed, replaced with EditMode | null at context boundaries
criteria.evidence: ImageEditCanvasContext now uses editMode: EditMode | null and setEditMode: (mode: EditMode | null) => void at src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/ImageEditCanvasContext.tsx:22-29. Repo grep for type ImageEditMode returned no matches.

criteria.name: useStrokeOverlayDrawing.ts uses canonical EditMode type instead of inline union
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/components/strokeOverlay/useStrokeOverlayDrawing.ts imports EditMode from ../../model/editSettingsTypes and types editMode: EditMode in StrokeOverlayDrawingProps.

criteria.name: MediaDisplayWithCanvas.tsx has no editMode cast
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/components/MediaDisplayWithCanvas.tsx now passes editMode={editMode} directly into StrokeOverlay; the prior inline cast was removed.

criteria.name: No 'enhance' string literal in src/domains/media-lightbox/ (only in video domain)
criteria.evidence: Targeted grep across the touched image-edit files found only one remaining 'enhance' reference: src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts:4 for VideoEditSubMode. The image EditMode union at line 1 now uses 'upscale', so the intent is met and remaining usage is video-only as settled.

criteria.name: buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts has no 'as any' casts for editMode values
criteria.evidence: src/domains/media-lightbox/model/buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts replaces the former 'magic-edit' as any fixture with the valid mode 'text'; no editMode-related as any remains in that file.

criteria.name: Manual smoke test: switch between all edit modes in lightbox and inline editor
criteria.evidence: Not verifiable from static review. Automated coverage improved materially, but manual UI smoke testing was not performed in this review.

summary: Approved. All must criteria pass. Direct inspection confirms the settled decisions were implemented: EditMode is canonical in editSettingsTypes.ts, null remains only at context boundaries, useInpainting no longer owns editMode state, bridge functions and edit-mode casts are removed, and targeted regression tests cover the mode-loss paths. The execution audit's missing-file findings are stale; current git status and diff match the claimed touched files.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Current git status/diff includes the claimed files despite the stale audit warning, and direct inspection confirms the canonical EditMode union, required useInpainting props, and removal of fallback edit-mode ownership.
Pass. The diff shows ImageEditMode removal and downstream type cleanup exactly where claimed; repo grep confirms the alias is gone and the stroke/media display consumers use the canonical type.
Pass. The bridge helpers are removed, both call sites now pass canonical editMode values directly, and the orchestrator returns persistedEditMode instead of the inpainting hook's mode.
Pass. The three modified test files and the new untracked orchestrator test file are present in git status, and the new assertions match the approved plan's targeted regression coverage.

Pass. No source edits were expected for final validation; executor command evidence in finalize.json matches the current repo grep state, and the narrowed enhance check correctly excludes the legitimate video-submode usage.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed by direct inspection of inpainting/types.ts and useInpainting.ts: editMode and setEditMode are required, fallbackEditMode is gone, and the setter is plain (mode: EditMode) => void.
Confirmed by direct grep and file review: ImageEditMode no longer exists as a type alias, useStrokeOverlayDrawing.ts uses canonical EditMode, and MediaDisplayWithCanvas.tsx no longer casts editMode.

Confirmed by direct inspection and grep: toInpaintingEditMode is removed, useImageEditOrchestrator returns persistedEditMode, and the edit-mode-related casts are gone from both orchestrator and inline editor.

Confirmed by test review: useInpainting covers reposition/img2img/upscale with empty brushStrokes, the orchestrator test checks persisted reposition rather than text fallback, and buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts no longer uses magic-edit as any.
Confirmed. Current repo grep checks are clean, and executor validation evidence records green tsc and both Vitest suite runs with zero failures.
